description_zh: 通用论文对比：研究问题、方法、数据、指标、结果和局限。
description_en: General paper comparison covering the problem, method, data, metrics, results, and limitations.

fields.name: problem
fields.description: Extract the research problem, objective, or question addressed by the paper.

fields.name: method
fields.description: Extract the main method, approach, or experimental design.

fields.name: dataset
fields.description: Extract the datasets, samples, study population, or data sources.

fields.name: metric
fields.description: Extract the principal evaluation metrics or measured outcomes.

fields.name: result
fields.description: Extract the main quantitative or qualitative findings.

fields.name: limitation
fields.description: Extract limitations, threats to validity, or stated weaknesses.
